places.name: Chan Retreat Center Hartovski Vrh (Dharmaloka)
places.lineage: Chinese Chan (Sheng Yen / Dharma Drum line)
places.notes: Residential Chan/Zen retreat center founded 2019 by Žarko Andričević, Dharma heir of Master Sheng Yen. Hosts Dharmaloka community.

places.name: Mokusho Zen Dojo Zagreb
places.notes: Founded by Monk Myoken (also founder of Bucharest Mokusho dojo). Eastern European Mokusho Zen network branch.
